item.description: Pay transparency laws can improve workplace culture and productivity – if organizations adapt

item.description: Toronto-based Constellation recently acquired 9.7-per-cent stake in Texas-based Sabre

item.description: Panel determined last April he had engaged in trading practices that were ‘a serious violation of CIRO’s rules’

item.description: Ottawa will have to perform a delicate balancing act between learning from procurement mistakes, pivoting to new supply chains and meeting North American alliance commitments

item.description: Company will supply India with uranium between 2027 and 2035 as country expands nuclear power sector

item.description: Completion of the road network will be five years ahead of schedule, Premier Doug Ford says

item.description: Gold and the US dollar jump but government bonds fall amid fears of an inflation shock

item.description: Small farms and low productivity mean their livelihoods did not improve even as markets hit a record high

item.description: Pair of offerings could jump-start Canada’s IPO market after a period of low activity

item.title: Canadian manufacturing PMI rises to 13-month high in February as new business increased
item.description: S&P Global Canada Manufacturing Purchasing Managers’ Index, a measure of factory sector health, rose to 51.0 last month from 50.4 in January

item.description: Long-haul carriers Etihad Airways and Emirates along with budget carrier FlyDubai said they would operate limited flights from the country

item.description: He oversaw the agency’s unsuccessful bid to stop Rogers’s $20-billion takeover of Shaw, which preceded some changes in competition law
